jobs.title: Saint Joseph's University
jobs.subtitle: Web Developer
bullets: Established and maintained SJU's web component pattern library, integrating atomic design principals into the university's web production ecosystem.
Designed, developed, and implemented new components across all university Drupal instances, performed upkeep and modification of existing components.
Adapted bi-annual university magazine and university report to fully digital experiences, led development and design of multiple interactive features.
Strategized and participated in a variety of digital marketing efforts, landing page activations, lead generation campaigns, and brand awareness efforts.

jobs.title: University of the Sciences
jobs.subtitle: Web Developer
bullets: Conceptualized, developed, and deployed new web features, functional improvements, third-party integrations, and designed new webpage templates to support enrollment, marketing, and institutional goals.
Developed numerous web projects including admission campaign landing pages, database-oriented resources, USciences Online microsite, and digitized the university magazine.

Managed web team and performed lead implementation duties as the university website transitioned to ModernCampus (aka OU Campus), met critical deadlines and milestones throughout the 16-monthlong project.
Generated technical documentation for web components and designs to allow for cross-team training and reference.

jobs.title: BenefitPackages
jobs.subtitle: Lead Web Developer
bullets: Redesigned website from the ground up and transitioned CMS platform to Wordpress.
Managed SEM campaign and led SEO efforts to help educate consumers in California and Nevada about the Affordable Healthcare Act.
Designed new logo and brand identity for use on stationary, business cards, and brochures.

jobs.title: Francisvale Home For Smaller Animals
jobs.subtitle: Web Developer
bullets: Redesigned Francisvale Home's website as well as upgraded and improved their Wordpress instance.
Developed an improved animal adoption platform to deliver a less cumbersome matching experience.
Promoted the animal shelter's web presence through SEO efforts and search marketing.

jobs.title: The Quixote Center
jobs.subtitle: Web Developer
bullets: Assisted with the recovery of Quixote Center's Wordpress website, which had been hijacked by hackers.
Redesigned the Quixote Center's web presence to better position their organization online, reimplemented recovered content.
Designed and built landing pages to promote the center's various non-profit activities.

jobs.title: National Positions
jobs.subtitle: Web Developer
bullets: Worked across the agency's roster of clients to provide white-glove website support and digital strategy consultation services.
Leveraged data-driven results via A/B testing to help clients improve their user experience and website conversion rates.
Developed and facilitated an in-house SEO training program for sales and support teams with the goal of improving team's technical knowhow.
Collaborated on special projects with SEM team to improve client's search visibility.
Participated in developing new product offerings and digital strategies at a leading internet marketing agency.

jobs.title: DJ TechTools
jobs.subtitle: Contributing Writer
bullets: Researched, developed, and wrote up digital music production tutorials.
Submitted reviews of various DJ hardware and DIY electronics projects.
Facilitated and produced interviews with DJs and other digital music-related figures.
Worked to improve DJTT on-page SEO efforts and align web content with Google best practices.

jobs.title: LaptopLogic.com / Logic Media Group
jobs.subtitle: News Editor / Contributing Writer
bullets: Research and wrote product reviews of laptops, mobile devices, and laptop accessories.
Edited other contributor's work, penned original news content, and managed the website's online advertising presence.
Contributed to the success of an industry-leading online mobile product review website.

jobs.title: Flight 33 Productions
jobs.subtitle: Post Production Assistant
bullets: Transported physical media, video dalies, audio dubs, scripts, and other work-critical materials to production facilities.
Maintained and provided on-site technical support for AVID Unity systems and Final Cut Pro editing bays.
Logged and organized stock footage resources.
Production credits include: Life After People (17 episodes), The Universe (11 episodes), Blood For The Gods (3 episodes), Patton 360 (10 episodes), and Prehistoric New York (5 episodes).

education.title: Ithaca College
subtitle: Bachelor of Arts, Digital Journalism
Minors in Political Science and Art History
bullets: Served as Editor of Design at The Ithacan student newspaper from 2005-2006
Participated in the Knight Innovation Incubator program
Represented the Republic of Chile and People's Democratic Republic of Algeria at Harvard's Model United Nations Conference in 2006 and 2007

awards.title: CUPPIE Award, 2016
awards.subtitle: Proven Everywhere Landing Page, Website
bullets: Website designed and developed in house encouraging users to learn more and apply to University of the Sciences.

awards.title: CUPPIE Award, 2016
awards.subtitle: Proven Everywhere Marketing Campaign, Wild Card
bullets: Digital, in-home, terrestrial, and web marketing campaign for USciences, created in association with Aloysius Butler & Clark.
